src/main/java/com/whl/spring/controller/.general_idea: Replace Apache Commons IO file operations with Java NIO APIs to remove the external dependency.
Replace Apache Commons IO stream copying with Java NIO Files.copy for downloading files.
Use Spring's MediaTypeFactory to detect content types instead of hardcoding application/octet-stream.
Refactor file path resolution to use a dedicated method with System.getProperty instead of ServletContext.
Replace manual 404 text response with a forward to a dedicated 404 error page.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new runtime environment.
Upgrade Spring Framework dependencies to version 6.1.14, which requires Java 17+ and aligns with Jakarta EE 10.
Upgrade Apache Tomcat to version 11.0.0, which is built for Jakarta EE 11 and Java 21.
Upgrade Jakarta Servlet API to version 6.1.0 to match the new Tomcat 11 and Spring 6.1 requirements.
Migrate from JUnit 4 (junit:junit) to JUnit 5 (org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter) for modern testing support.
Upgrade Jackson Databind to version 2.18.0 for latest features and security patches.
Upgrade Commons IO to version 2.17.0 for maintenance updates.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.13.0 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 compilation.
Upgrade Maven WAR Plugin to 3.4.0 for better packaging support.
Upgrade Maven Javadoc Plugin to 3.10.1 for improved documentation generation.
Upgrade Maven Source Plugin to 3.3.1 for source jar generation updates.
Add Maven Antrun Plugin 3.1.0 to allow running Ant tasks within the Maven build lifecycle.
Add Maven Dependency Plugin 3.8.0 to manage dependency copying and analysis.
Switch Maven repositories from a private Nexus instance to the public Aliyun mirror for better accessibility.
Rename groupId and artifactId to reflect the new project identity.
Introduce a ${revision} property for version management, likely for CI/CD integration.
Explicitly define Tomcat embed dependencies in dependencyManagement to centralize version control.

.gitignore.general_idea: Simplified gitignore rules by removing redundant target/build directory exclusions for source folders.
.gitignore.human_impl: Changed '!**/src/main/**/target/' to '!**/src/main/**' and removed build exclusions.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added standard IDE, OS, and project-specific directories to gitignore.
.gitignore.human_impl: Added entries for .svn, .DS_Store, log/, logs/, upload/, and libs/.

README.md.general_idea: Update the repository title in the README to reflect the specific demo project name.
README.md.human_impl: Changed header from '# spring' to '# spring-demo'

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation instructions for handling provided-scope dependencies in the classpath.
README.md.human_impl: Added line: `Add dependencies with "provided" scope to classpath`

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/templates/index..general_idea: Add a missing <head> section with a <title> to the JSP template to ensure valid HTML structure.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/templates/test.j.general_idea: Replace the reference to the unminified jQuery script with the minified version to reduce payload size.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Configure a custom error page for HTTP 404 Not Found responses.
Configure a custom error page for HTTP 500 Internal Server Error responses.
